title: spiraea elliptica
intro: Spiraea elliptica, also known as the Spirea or Meadowsweet, is a flowering shrub native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spiraea elliptica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate colds and flu, and soothe skin irritations. Spiraea elliptica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
